title: T-032 — E2E Playwright: SO → Alloc → Pick → Pack → Ship-confirm → D365 dispatch happy path (11-shipping-j)
prompt:
# T-032 — E2E shipping spine

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §8 Core Flows (SO → Alloc → Pick → Pack → Ship → RMA), §2 Metryki sukcesu (OTD %), §6 D-SHP-14
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Playwright spec covering the end-to-end shipping spine across multiple modules with seeded test data: create customer → create SO → confirm SO → allocate (FEFO) → release wave → pick (scanner simulated) → pack box → confirm shipment → verify D365 outbox enqueue → mock D365 OData success → verify status='delivered' via POD upload.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/e2e/shipping-spine.spec.ts` uses T-123 Playwright harness + fixtures.
2. Seed: org A; customer C-001 with shipping address + allergen restriction; product P-001 (FG SSOT, NPD); 3 LPs in 05-WH with expiry dates ASC.
3. Test steps (sequential):
   - Login as shipping_manager.
   - Open `/(shipping)/customers` → seed already exists; verify customer row.
   - Open SO wizard, fill 4 steps, submit; verify SO created and status='draft'.
   - Open SO detail, click Confirm; verify status='confirmed' + outbox shipping.so.confirmed enqueued.
   - Open `/(shipping)/allocations`, run allocateSO; verify status='allocated' + FEFO sort.
   - Open `/(shipping)/picks/waves/build` → build wave → release wave; verify pick_lists created.
   - Switch to scanner-style mock session; call executePick API for each pick_list_line with scan_event_id; verify pick_list_lines.status='picked'.
   - Open `/(shipping)/pack/<station>` → close box (with valid weight) → confirm shipment; verify shipments.status='shipped' + sscc + bol generated + shipping_outbox_events row with event_type='shipment.confirmed' and idempotency_key='ship::<id>::v1'.
   - Run apps/worker dispatcher (T-029) against mock D365 OData; verify event status='delivered' and OTel span recorded.
   - Open `/(shipping)/shipments/<id>` → upload POD → verify status='delivered' + pod_hash present.
4. Each step captures Playwright trace + screenshot.
5. The test asserts cross-module invariants:
   - SSCC passes mod-10 (V-SHIP-LBL-03).
   - No `factory_release_state` field appears in D365 adapter output (export-only contract).
   - 05-WH license_plates.status transitioned: available → reserved → shipped (via 05-WH transition_lp DSL).
   - 09-QA: any active hold blocks confirmShipment (run a HOLD scenario in a sub-test).
   - audit_events row written for each major mutation (R13).

## Files
- apps/web/e2e/shipping-spine.spec.ts [create]
- apps/web/e2e/fixtures/shipping-seed.ts [create]
- apps/web/e2e/mocks/d365-odata-mock.ts [create]
- apps/web/e2e/__tests__/shipping-spine.smoke.test.ts [create — smoke runner]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the test is run via `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web playwright test apps/web/e2e/shipping-spine.spec.ts`, when the spine completes, then all 10 steps pass with no flakes (3-run streak) and Playwright trace is captured for each step.
2. Given a sub-test introduces a critical quality_hold on the allocated LP before confirmShipment, when the action is invoked, then it returns blocker_code='qa.critical_hold' and the test asserts shipments.status remains 'packed'.
3. Given the D365 adapter output is captured at dispatch, when the JSON is grep-asserted for `factory_release_state`, then zero occurrences (export-only contract).
4. Given license_plates rows are inspected post-shipment, when state is checked, then status transitions are: available → reserved (at allocate) → shipped (at confirmShipment) — all atomic.
5. Given audit_events is queried post-test, when rows are counted, then at least one R13-tagged row exists per mutation step.
6. CLOSEOUT evidence includes Playwright trace + per-step screenshots + DB state snapshot + adapter output assertion.

## Test strategy
- RED: write the spec asserting the 6 ACs; spec must fail until all upstream tasks (T-001..T-031) are green.
- Use Playwright tracing and screenshots per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web playwright test apps/web/e2e/shipping-spine.spec.ts` 3 times in a row.

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement Server Actions in this task — consumer of T-007/T-012/T-016/T-020/T-023/T-025/T-029.
- Do not bypass T-013 quality-hold gate in any test branch.
- Do not skip the export-only adapter assertion.
- Do not let the test leak data across runs (use isolated org per run + cleanup hook).
- Do not allow flakes >0.1% — fix root cause if any step is unstable.
- Do not rely on real D365 endpoint — only mock OData server (apps/web/e2e/mocks/d365-odata-mock.ts).

Note: SSCC generation in the spine test must read organizations.gs1_company_prefix from 02-settings (never hardcoded).

pipeline_inputs.description: E2E Playwright spec across 11-SHIPPING + cross-module (05-WH, 09-QA, NPD, 02-SETTINGS) covering SO → Alloc → Pick → Pack → Ship → D365 → POD happy path + QA-hold blocker branch + export-only adapter assertion.

out_of_scope: Do not implement Server Actions (consumers only).
Do not test RMA flow (separate spec).
Do not test real D365 endpoint.
cross_module_dependencies: 09-quality/T-064 (consume gate — spine test asserts holdsGuard is called for each LP mutation step; per 2026-05-14 audit)

Given D365 adapter output captured at dispatch, when grep-asserted for factory_release_state, then zero occurrences (export-only R15 anti-corruption, must not mutate canonical Monopilot state).
Given license_plates inspected post-shipment, when state checked, then transitions: available → reserved → shipped, all captured in audit_events (R13-tagged row per mutation step).
CLOSEOUT evidence includes Playwright trace + per-step screenshots + DB state snapshot + adapter output assertion.
test_strategy: RED: write the spec asserting the 6 ACs.
Capture Playwright trace + screenshots per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.
